articles.title: U.S. and Iran launch fresh strikes following attacks on commercial ships - The Washington Post
articles.description: Iran said it had targeted more than 80 U.S. military facilities in Bahrain and Kuwait, after the U.S. launched strikes in response to attacks on commercial ships in the Strait of Hormuz.

articles.title: NASA's New Horizons spacecraft wakes from its longest hibernation in good health - Phys.org
articles.description: Following its longest hibernation period ever of nearly a year, NASA's New Horizons spacecraft has emerged in good health and is ready to begin transmitting science data gathered in the distant Kuiper Belt far beyond Pluto.
